title: Add PDF download for payslips

requirements.text: Implement client-side PDF generation for payslips so that each employee's monthly payslip can be downloaded as a properly formatted PDF directly from the browser. The PDF must include all payslip sections already rendered in PayslipView.tsx: employee details (name, ID, department, designation), pay period (month/year), earnings breakdown (Basic, HRA, DA, allowances), deductions breakdown (EPF, ESI, PT, LWF, TDS, loan deductions), gross pay, total deductions, and net pay. Add a 'Download PDF' button on the PayslipView page that triggers the PDF download without requiring a backend call.

quotes: Would you like to add payslip PDF export so employees can download their monthly salary statements?

acceptanceCriteria: A 'Download PDF' button is visible on the PayslipView page alongside the existing Print button.
Clicking 'Download PDF' generates and downloads a PDF file named in the format 'Payslip_<EmployeeName>_<Month>_<Year>.pdf'.
The PDF contains all payslip sections: employee info, pay period, earnings table, deductions table, gross pay, total deductions, and net pay.
The PDF layout is clean and professional, consistent with the existing teal/green enterprise theme.
PDF generation works entirely client-side with no backend dependency.
The downloaded PDF renders correctly in standard PDF viewers (Chrome, Adobe Reader, etc.).

constraints: PDF generation must be entirely client-side — no backend changes required.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve all existing payslip data logic and payslip view rendering in PayslipView.tsx.
nonGoals: Bulk PDF export for all employees at once.
Changes to payslip data calculations or payroll processing logic.
